name: Chronicle Engine
description: Historical-memory engine for OpenClaw with remote backend authority and local context orchestration.

remoteBackend.description: Remote memory backend transport configuration. This is the canonical and only supported runtime authority mode.

enabled.description: Must be true. Local-authority runtime has been removed.

baseURL.description: Remote backend base URL (for example http://127.0.0.1:8080)

authToken.description: Runtime bearer token used for data-plane backend calls

enableManagementTools.description: Enable management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, and governance-oriented self-improvement review/extract actions

sessionStrategy.description: Choose session pipeline: plugin memory-reflection, built-in session-memory, or none

autoRecallMinLength.description: Minimum prompt length (in characters) to trigger auto-recall. Prompts shorter than this are skipped. Default: 15 for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.description: Minimum number of turns before the same memory can be recalled again in the same session. Set to 0 to disable deduplication (default behavior: inject all memories).

autoRecallTopK.description: Maximum number of rows injected into <relevant-memories> for each turn.

autoRecallSelectionMode.description: Generic Auto-Recall final top-k mode. mmr keeps direct truncation after post-processing as the canonical mode; setwise-v2 enables set-wise final selection with higher diversity/coverage but potentially lower average per-item relevance.

autoRecallCategories.description: Allowlist of memory categories eligible for generic Auto-Recall.

autoRecallExcludeReflection.description: Exclude category=reflection rows from generic Auto-Recall.

autoRecallMaxAgeDays.description: Drop Auto-Recall candidates older than this many days.

autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.description: Per normalized text key, keep only the most recent N entries before Auto-Recall final trimming.

sessionMemory.description: Deprecated legacy switch. Kept for compatibility and mapped to sessionStrategy.

messageCount.description: Legacy compatibility field. Mapped to memoryReflection.messageCount.

agentId.description: Optional dedicated agent id used to run reflection generation (for example: memory-distiller).

remoteBackend.enabled.label: Enable Remote Backend
remoteBackend.enabled.help: Route runtime memory authority through the remote HTTP backend (canonical mode). `remoteBackend.baseURL` and `remoteBackend.authToken` are required.

remoteBackend.baseURL.label: Remote Backend Base URL
remoteBackend.baseURL.help: Base URL for the remote memory backend service.

remoteBackend.authToken.label: Remote Backend Token
remoteBackend.authToken.help: Bearer token for authenticated runtime data-plane calls.

remoteBackend.maxRetries.label: Remote Max Retries
remoteBackend.maxRetries.help: Retry count for retryable backend failures.

remoteBackend.retryBackoffMs.label: Remote Retry Backoff (ms)
remoteBackend.retryBackoffMs.help: Base retry backoff between backend attempts.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoRecallMinLength.label: Auto-Recall Min Length
autoRecallMinLength.help: Minimum prompt length to trigger auto-recall (shorter prompts are skipped). Default: 15 chars for English, 6 for CJK.

autoRecallMinRepeated.label: Auto-Recall Min Repeated
autoRecallMinRepeated.help: Minimum number of conversation turns before a specific memory can be re-injected in the same session.

autoRecallTopK.label: Auto-Recall Top K
autoRecallTopK.help: Maximum rows injected into <relevant-memories> each turn.

autoRecallSelectionMode.label: Auto-Recall Selection Mode
autoRecallSelectionMode.help: Generic final top-k mode: mmr is the canonical direct-truncation mode; setwise-v2 enables a more diverse final selector with possible average relevance tradeoffs.

autoRecallCategories.label: Auto-Recall Categories
autoRecallCategories.help: Allowlist of categories eligible for generic auto-recall.

autoRecallMaxAgeDays.label: Auto-Recall Max Age (days)
autoRecallMaxAgeDays.help: Drop auto-recall candidates older than this many days.

autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.label: Auto-Recall Max Entries Per Key
autoRecallMaxEntriesPerKey.help: Per normalized text key, keep only the most recent N entries before top-k trimming.

captureAssistant.label: Capture Assistant Messages
captureAssistant.help: Also auto-capture assistant messages (default false to reduce memory pollution)

sessionMemory.enabled.label: Session Memory (Deprecated)
sessionMemory.enabled.help: Legacy compatibility: true maps to systemSessionMemory, false maps to none.

sessionMemory.messageCount.label: Session Message Count (Legacy)
sessionMemory.messageCount.help: Legacy compatibility field; mapped to memoryReflection.messageCount.

selfImprovement.enabled.label: Self-Improvement
selfImprovement.enabled.help: Enable self-improvement reminder and governance tools

selfImprovement.skipSubagentBootstrap.label: Skip Subagent Bootstrap
selfImprovement.skipSubagentBootstrap.help: Do not inject reminder file into subagent bootstrap context

memoryReflection.agentId.label: Reflection Agent Id
memoryReflection.agentId.help: Optional dedicated agent id used for reflection generation (e.g. memory-distiller)

memoryReflection.messageCount.label: Reflection Message Count
memoryReflection.messageCount.help: Recent messages included in reflection input

memoryReflection.maxInputChars.label: Reflection Max Input Chars
memoryReflection.maxInputChars.help: Max prompt chars sent to reflection run

memoryReflection.errorReminderMaxEntries.label: Error Reminder Max Entries
memoryReflection.errorReminderMaxEntries.help: Max recent error hints injected into prompt

memoryReflection.dedupeErrorSignals.label: Dedupe Error Signals
memoryReflection.dedupeErrorSignals.help: Deduplicate repeated error signatures per session

memoryReflection.recall.mode.label: Reflection-Recall Mode
memoryReflection.recall.mode.help: fixed keeps compatibility inheritance; dynamic enables prompt-gated Reflection-Recall.

memoryReflection.recall.topK.label: Reflection-Recall Top K
memoryReflection.recall.topK.help: Maximum rows injected into <inherited-rules> in dynamic mode.

memoryReflection.recall.includeKinds.label: Reflection-Recall Include Kinds
memoryReflection.recall.includeKinds.help: Which reflection item kinds are considered in dynamic mode (invariant/derived).

memoryReflection.recall.maxAgeDays.label: Reflection-Recall Max Age (days)
memoryReflection.recall.maxAgeDays.help: Drop dynamic reflection candidates older than this many days.

memoryReflection.recall.maxEntriesPerKey.label: Reflection-Recall Max Entries Per Key
memoryReflection.recall.maxEntriesPerKey.help: Per normalized key, keep only the most recent N rows before dynamic aggregation.

memoryReflection.recall.minRepeated.label: Reflection-Recall Min Repeated
memoryReflection.recall.minRepeated.help: Minimum turn gap before re-injecting the same dynamic reflection row in one session.

memoryReflection.recall.minScore.label: Reflection-Recall Min Score
memoryReflection.recall.minScore.help: Minimum aggregated score required for dynamic reflection injection.

memoryReflection.recall.minPromptLength.label: Reflection-Recall Min Prompt Length
memoryReflection.recall.minPromptLength.help: Prompts shorter than this are skipped in dynamic reflection mode.

enableManagementTools.label: Management Tools
enableManagementTools.help: Enable management/debug tools such as memory_list, memory_stats, and governance-oriented self-improvement review/extract actions.
